Clear SG&A overhead component.

candidates.why: Explicit interest label, but values/signs appear inconsistent across years and likely not the clean recurring financing-cost series.

candidates.why: Recurring interest subcomponent, but incomplete by itself.

Equity line, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow item, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.

Includes minority interest, so less preferred when owner equity is available.
Shareholder count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.
